segments.text: I was glad when they said to me, 'Let us go to the house of the LORD!'
segments.speaker: David

heading: A Song of Ascents. Of David

segments.text: Our feet have been standing within your gates, O Jerusalem!
Jerusalem—built as a city that is bound firmly together,
to which the tribes go up, the tribes of the LORD, as was decreed for Israel, to give thanks to the name of the LORD.
There thrones for judgment were set, the thrones of the house of David.
Pray for the peace of Jerusalem! May they be secure who love you!
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Peace be within your walls and security within your towers!
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: For my brothers and companions' sake I will say, 'Peace be within you!'
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: For the sake of the house of the LORD our God, I will seek your good.
segments.speaker: David
